Level 1: you have used 144 actions; a strong score needs about 78 or fewer. You are 1.8x over the target.
If you are not steadily making progress toward the level goal, commit to your single best hypothesis and the shortest sequence that tests it — do not exhaustively scan rows/columns or enumerate every option. Test one idea, read the result, then decide.

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Key findings:
1. UP from rows 14-18, cols 14-18 → rows 8-12, cols 14-18 (back to start).
2. RIGHT 4 times from start → rows 8-12, cols 38-42 (end position).
3. DOWN from rows 8-12, cols 38-42 was blocked (board_changed=False).
4. Second DOWN: board_changed=True but block stayed at rows 8-12, cols 38-42. This is strange.
5. Third DOWN: board_changed=False, blocked.
So the block is at rows 8-12, cols 38-42 (top-right corner). DOWN is blocked from here. The right corridor doesn't extend down from this position.
Looking at the image, the block is at the top-right corner of the maze. The red path is below, going down the right side. But the white corridor doesn't seem to extend down from rows 8-12, cols 38-42.
Wait, looking at the image more carefully, the red path is at rows 8-20, cols 38-42 (vertical). But the white corridor at rows 8-12, cols 38-42 doesn't connect to the white corridor below. There might be a wall between rows 12 and rows 14 at cols 38-42.
So the block is stuck at rows 8-12, cols 38-42. The only valid actions are LEFT (to go back) or SPACE.
Let me try pressing SPACE at this position to see what happens. Earlier, pressing SPACE at this position reset the block to start. But maybe the behavior is different now, or maybe I need to press SPACE at a different position.
Actually, looking at the image, the block is at the top-right corner, which is the end of the red path. The red square is at this position. Maybe pressing SPACE here completes the level.
Let me try pressing SPACE.

sections.label: ASSISTANT
sections.content:
World model update: Block at rows 8-12, cols 38-42 (top-right, end of red path). DOWN blocked. Only LEFT or SPACE available. This is the target position (red square). Need to try SPACE to complete level.
Plan: Press SPACE at end position to attempt level completion.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Block at rows 8-12, cols 38-42 (end position). Try SPACE.
result = action(['SPACE'])
print(f"After SPACE: step={current_frame.step}, level={current_frame.level}")
print(f"Result: {last_action_result}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
blue_block = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 24]
print(f"Blue block: {[(n['boundary']) for n in blue_block]}")

# Check HUD bars
hud_blue = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b' and n['boundary'][0][0] == 63 and n['pixels'] > 10]
hud_gray = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'w' and n['boundary'][0][0] == 63]
print(f"HUD blue: {[(n['pixels']) for n in hud_blue]}")
print(f"HUD gray: {[(n['pixels']) for n in hud_gray]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
